title: daemon jmap session_state_token omits SpaceMember SpaceInvite Category types
description: session_state_token (jmap.rs lines 211-218) hashes only ChatContact, Chat, Message, and Space sequence numbers to produce the session state token. SpaceMember, SpaceInvite, and Category sequences are excluded. When those objects change the session token does not change, so SSE push never fires for those state transitions. Clients polling or reacting to push events will silently miss membership changes, invite updates, and category renames.
